title: Effectiveness of liquid smoke as a preservative agent of barracuda fish cake during cold storage
venue: IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environment
snippet: Barracuda is one species of white fleshed fish that has a soft texture and a savoury taste, therefore it can be processed into fish cakes. Fish cake is a perishable food caused by bacterial activity that can be prevented using preservative namely liquid smoke. The addition of liquid smoke can provide an extended shelf life and a unique taste sensation in fish cakes because it functions as an antibacterial. The purpose of the study was to determine the role of liquid smoke in increasing the shelf
